key.name: sync-server-url
key.description: The URL of the Save Button server to synchronize with.

key.name: sync-email
key.description: The email address for authenticating with the Save Button Server.

key.name: sync-enabled
key.description: Derived flag mirroring JWT token presence. Written only by AuthService on sign-in and sign-out. UI state is computed from auth-method + auth-email, not from this key.

key.name: sync-in-progress
key.description: Whether a synchronization operation is currently in progress.

key.name: sync-last-error
key.description: The last error that occurred during synchronization, if any.

key.name: sync-last-success
key.description: Timestamp of the last successful synchronization.

key.name: auth-method
key.description: The authentication method: "basic" for email/password, "token" for JWT tokens.

key.name: auth-pkce-verifier
key.description: Temporary PKCE code verifier for in-progress browser login flow.

key.name: auth-email
key.description: The email address from the JWT token payload, set after token-based authentication.

key.name: auth-identity-provider
key.description: The OAuth2 identity provider used for the current session (e.g. "google_oauth2", "microsoft_graph", "apple"). Empty string for email/password JWT logins.

key.name: native-host-port
key.description: The port number for the local HTTP server that accepts files from the browser extension.
